buy_low_hitters.name: Ben Rice
buy_low_hitters.take: xwOBA +.058 gap (4th largest in MLB). Hard-hit rate #7 in MLB. Expected .283/.951 vs actual .255/.836 — massive breakout imminent.

buy_low_hitters.name: Jo Adell
buy_low_hitters.take: Career-best barrel rate (17.2%), exit velo (91.7 mph), hard-hit rate (49.6%). The breakout is backed by elite contact quality.

buy_low_hitters.name: Austin Riley
buy_low_hitters.take: Elite barrel rate and exit velo despite injuries. When healthy he's .280/35HR. The barrels haven't declined — just games played.

buy_low_hitters.name: Vinnie Pasquantino
buy_low_hitters.take: .463 xSLG, 90.9 mph EV, 30.1% squared-up rate. ADP says R8, barrels say R4-5 power profile.

buy_low_hitters.name: Bryan Reynolds
buy_low_hitters.take: Career-best 91.2 mph avg EV and .425 xwOBA. Monthly wOBA of .282/.321/.308 was terrible luck. Largest xwOBA gap among OFs.

buy_low_hitters.name: Andres Gimenez
buy_low_hitters.take: .210 BA vs .252 xBA. Career .253 hitter with 30-steal upside. Elite buy-low at scarcest position (2B).

buy_low_hitters.name: Colson Montgomery
buy_low_hitters.take: .341 xwOBA, 14.5% barrel rate, 77 mph bat speed, 111.4 mph max EV (top 8% MLB). 21 HR in 71 games — full season = 30+ HR.

buy_low_hitters.name: George Springer
buy_low_hitters.take: Career-high barrel rate (15.8%) and hard-hit rate (46.7%) at age 36. One more productive year at a massive discount.

buy_low_hitters.name: Matt Wallner
buy_low_hitters.take: EV50 comps to Vladdy and Oneil Cruz. Hits the ball as hard as anyone but ADP is round 10.

buy_low_hitters.name: Marcell Ozuna
buy_low_hitters.take: .354 xwOBA (84th percentile), 11.4% barrel rate despite down year. 25+ HR hiding in the expected stats.

buy_low_hitters.name: Salvador Perez
buy_low_hitters.take: .525 SLG vs .608 xSLG — largest gap in baseball. Elite xwOBA (.403) at catcher. 30+ HR with AVG bump incoming.

buy_low_hitters.name: Marcus Semien
buy_low_hitters.take: .251 BABIP (5th-lowest among qualifiers) despite 20.2% line drive rate. Due for a major bounce playing half games at Globe Life.

sell_high_avoid.name: Andrew Abbott
sell_high_avoid.take: 2.87 ERA vs 4.31 SIERA — largest gap in MLB. 21% K rate (below avg), lowest GB rate in league (31%). Pitches at GABP. Massive regression incoming.

sell_high_avoid.name: Josh Naylor
sell_high_avoid.take: Below-avg barrel rate, below-avg hard-hit rate. .315 BABIP is 30pts above career norm. Projects .271/.771. Overvalued.

sell_high_avoid.name: Jose Altuve
sell_high_avoid.take: Career-low exit velo. Barrel/hard-hit declining 3 years. xBA 11th worst, xwOBA 3rd worst among 600+ PA. Projects .237/.684.

sell_high_avoid.name: Christian Yelich
sell_high_avoid.take: 29 HR masked career-low exit velo, lowest hard-hit since 2017. Projects .245/.769 vs actual .274/.795.

sell_high_avoid.name: Nick Kurtz
sell_high_avoid.take: ADP 20 is absurdly high. First base is deep — Harper, Naylor, Walker all carry similar or better profiles at lower cost. Paying rookie premium.

sell_high_avoid.name: Cal Raleigh
sell_high_avoid.take: Overpriced for a limited-category contributor. K concerns, AVG/OPS drag. Large regression projected from career year.

sell_high_avoid.name: Jacob deGrom
sell_high_avoid.take: Age 38. 1.4 HR/9 masked by .194 BABIP against — that BABIP regresses hard. Premium price for premium risk.

sell_high_avoid.name: Logan Webb
sell_high_avoid.take: Sub-23% K rate 3 consecutive seasons before spiking to 26.2%. Likely an outlier, not a new norm.

sell_high_avoid.name: Gavin Williams
sell_high_avoid.take: 3.06 ERA but 4.30 xERA and 4.39 FIP. Surface stats are deceiving.

sell_high_avoid.name: Jonathan Aranda
sell_high_avoid.take: .409 BABIP. Lacks speed/athleticism to sustain it. Regression to .250-.260 AVG coming.

buy_low_pitchers.name: Dylan Cease
buy_low_pitchers.take: 4.55 ERA but 3.46 xERA — nearly a full run of bad luck. 20% K-BB%, 29.8% K rate. Blue Jays gave him $210M for a reason.

buy_low_pitchers.name: Eury Perez
buy_low_pitchers.take: 8th-highest Stuff+ (118) at age 22. Post-July: 3.86 ERA, 0.96 WHIP. Per-inning dominance is ace-caliber. ADP ~155 is criminal.

buy_low_pitchers.name: Shane Baz
buy_low_pitchers.take: 97 mph fastball, 107 Stuff+, 125 Stuff+ curveball. Environment upgrade to Baltimore. 175+ K upside at ADP 200.

buy_low_pitchers.name: Hunter Greene
buy_low_pitchers.take: Led all 90+ IP pitchers in Stuff+ (120). 117 Stuff+ FB, 137 Stuff+ slider (37% K rate). Cy Young dark horse.

buy_low_pitchers.name: MacKenzie Gore
buy_low_pitchers.take: Only SP with 3 pitches at 18%+ SwStr rate. 138:35 K:BB first half (3.02 ERA). Second half collapsed but stuff is SP2.

buy_low_pitchers.name: Emmet Sheehan
buy_low_pitchers.take: 2.82 ERA, 0.97 WHIP, 23% K-BB%, 16.2% SwStr in 73 IP. Rare elite swing-and-miss plus command at a discount.

buy_low_pitchers.name: Kyle Bradish
buy_low_pitchers.take: 25.9% K-BB% (2nd only to Skubal) in 71 IP. If healthy, SP2 production at SP4 price.

buy_low_pitchers.name: Edward Cabrera
buy_low_pitchers.take: Chase rate, whiff rate, K rate all above average. Results will catch up to stuff. ADP 192 = smash value.

buy_low_pitchers.name: Cam Schlittler
buy_low_pitchers.take: 2.96 ERA, 27.6% K rate, 98 mph fastball. Legitimate ace upside at ADP 134.

sprint_speed_sb.name: Jose Caballero
sprint_speed_sb.take: Led MLB with 49 SB in 126 games — best SB/PA ratio in baseball. Pure steals cheat code.

sprint_speed_sb.name: Victor Scott II
sprint_speed_sb.take: 30.2 ft/sec, 34/38 SB attempts (89%). Zero power (.216 BA) but steals are free.

sprint_speed_sb.name: Chandler Simpson
sprint_speed_sb.take: Elite speed. If he gets ABs, he steals 30+. Late-round SB fix.

sprint_speed_sb.name: Daylen Lile
sprint_speed_sb.take: 29.7 ft/sec (tied 14th MLB). Hit .391 with 6 HR and 7 triples in Sept. Watch lineup spot.

sprint_speed_sb.name: Nasim Nunez
sprint_speed_sb.take: 98th percentile sprint, 36 SB in 63 AAA games. Projects 30+ SB if he gets 300 AB. Essentially free.

sprint_speed_sb.name: Brice Turang
sprint_speed_sb.take: Gained more bat speed than any qualified hitter (+2.8 mph). wOBA jumped 52 points. Speed + emerging power.

spring_training.name: Jac Caglianone
spring_training.signal: 120.2 mph double, 116.5 mph double, 115.2 mph/460-ft HR. EV90 of 116.5 mph — hitting harder than nearly anyone alive.

spring_training.name: Zac Veen
spring_training.signal: Added 40+ lbs. 95.6 mph avg EV, 58.3% hard-hit rate. 113.3 mph, 468-ft walk-off HR (longest of spring).

spring_training.name: Roki Sasaki
spring_training.signal: Threw 11 cutters — completely new pitch replacing ineffective slider. Monitor closely.

spring_training.name: Ryan Weathers
spring_training.signal: Big breakout candidate. Arsenal compares to Luzardo, Skubal, Crochet.

spring_training.name: Jordon Abell
spring_training.signal: Velo up 1-1.5 mph on FB and slider. 11 K, 0 BB in 6 spring IP. 2.20 ERA, 10.4 K/9 at Triple-A age 23.

spring_training.name: Carlos Estevez
spring_training.signal: WARNING: -6.9 mph velocity drop this spring. Major concern for closer role.

spring_training.name: Mike Trout
spring_training.signal: Sprint speed 29.9 ft/sec, just below elite 30+. Health and athleticism appear restored.

injury_flags.name: Corbin Burnes
injury_flags.action: IL stash only — don't draft before R18

injury_flags.name: Gerrit Cole
injury_flags.action: Discount ADP heavily, IL stash R15+

injury_flags.name: Spencer Strider
injury_flags.action: Don't draft before R10 without 3 other SPs

injury_flags.name: Josh Hader
injury_flags.action: AVOID — Bryan Abreu is the real closer

injury_flags.name: Garrett Crochet
injury_flags.action: Still an ace but monitor pitch counts early

injury_flags.name: Corbin Carroll
injury_flags.action: Hamate injuries sap power for months — discount

closer_situations.status: Abreu is THE closer. Hader has biceps + shoulder issues.
True committee. Could be streaming gold with 7 transactions.
Uribe is top closer-in-waiting. Could take over by May.
Smith has job. Monitor if Clase returns.
Jansen's job to lose. Age 38 concern.
Closer on bad team = limited save opps.
